subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! Today, this title is the most wondrous of melodies, for the power of God's Cause lieth in the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان الیوم این عنوان از ابدع الحان زیرا قوت امر الله بعهد
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @firmness in the Covenant
